audit_scope: Architecture and production-readiness review across API gateway, Temporal worker, queueing, OCR services, Triton model backend, Docker/runtime config, and observability.

tasks.title: Fix queue semantics to prevent permanent queue saturation
tasks.flaw: Jobs are enqueued but workflows are started immediately; no consumer calls Dequeue, and pending zset entries are not removed during status transitions.
tasks.impact: Queue length can grow to max and reject new jobs (HTTP 429) even while workers are idle.
actions: Choose one model: true queue-driven dispatch OR direct Temporal dispatch (remove Redis queue).
If queue-driven: add a dedicated dispatcher that calls Dequeue and starts workflows.
Ensure status transitions remove pending entries atomically.
Add queue invariant tests (pending + processing + completed consistency).
acceptance_criteria: Queue depth reflects actual waiting jobs only.
No saturation under 200+ sequential jobs with normal completion.
Prometheus metrics match Redis state.
implementation_notes: Queue status transitions now remove non-queued jobs from pending zset.
PROCESSING transition now records started_at and processing hash entry.
Workflow start failure now cancels queue job to prevent capacity leakage.

tasks.title: Replace placeholder post-processing gRPC contract with real protobuf-generated implementation
tasks.flaw: Post-processing client/server are placeholder stubs; client returns success without network invoke, bypassing real redaction/validation.
tasks.impact: Compliance and data-protection risk: PII redaction path is effectively non-authoritative.
actions: Generate protobuf stubs for postprocessing service (Go + Python).
Implement real gRPC service registration in post-processing service.
Make worker call actual RPC and fail hard on unavailable post-processing.
Add contract tests to verify redaction behavior end-to-end.
acceptance_criteria: Worker invokes real gRPC endpoint (verified by integration test and logs).
PII redaction toggles produce expected output diffs.
No placeholder client code remains in runtime path.
implementation_notes: Replaced local success bypass in Go client with real grpc Invoke to /postprocessing.PostProcessingService/PostProcess.
Added server-side RPC registration in post-processing service using grpc generic handler with JSON request/response serialization.
Remaining work: swap placeholder contract with protoc-generated stubs for strict protobuf compliance.

tasks.title: Resolve environment variable drift and auth misconfiguration
tasks.flaw: Config keys differ across compose/.env/code (e.g., API key var names, timeout names, PaddleOCR var aliases).
tasks.impact: Silent fallback to defaults, invalid auth in some environments, inconsistent behavior between local/dev/prod.
actions: Create a single env contract doc + schema validation at startup.
Unify names (IDEP_API_KEYS, SERVICE_REQUEST_TIMEOUT, CIRCUIT_BREAKER_TIMEOUT, PaddleOCR prefixed keys).
Fail startup on unknown/missing critical vars.
Add env conformance test in CI.
acceptance_criteria: All services start with same behavior in local and compose.
No fallback to insecure defaults for auth/credentials.
Startup validation reports zero mismatches.
implementation_notes: Gateway config now supports timeout/circuit-breaker env aliases for compose compatibility.
Remaining work: startup schema validation and CI env conformance checks.

tasks.title: Eliminate hardcoded credentials and insecure defaults
tasks.flaw: Default database/minio/grafana credentials and dev API keys are embedded in runtime config.
tasks.impact: Immediate security exposure in production-like deployments.
actions: Move secrets to secret manager / Docker secrets / env injection pipeline.
Remove static dev credentials from compose default profiles.
Add startup guard that blocks boot with known weak/default secrets.
acceptance_criteria: No hardcoded secrets in runtime manifests.
Security scan finds zero default credentials.
Production profile requires explicit secret injection.

tasks.title: Refactor rate limiting for bounded memory and correct identity keying
tasks.flaw: In-memory map grows per unique Authorization/IP and is not distributed across replicas.
tasks.impact: Memory growth + inconsistent throttling in multi-instance deployments.
actions: Move rate limiting to Redis-based sliding window/token bucket.
Key by normalized API key hash, not full header string.
Add TTL eviction and metrics.
acceptance_criteria: Stable memory profile under high-cardinality traffic.
Consistent limits across multiple gateway replicas.

tasks.title: Harden service-to-service transport and trust boundaries
tasks.flaw: Internal calls use insecure gRPC/HTTP and permissive CORS (`*`) with credentials settings.
tasks.impact: Lateral movement risk and browser policy inconsistencies.
actions: Use mTLS for gRPC internal traffic where feasible.
Restrict CORS origins by environment.
Disable credentials with wildcard origins.
acceptance_criteria: No wildcard CORS in production profile.
Internal RPC channels are authenticated/encrypted.

tasks.title: Introduce robust readiness/liveness and startup dependency checks
tasks.flaw: Several services lack healthchecks or rely on shallow checks; gateway health duplicates checks for Triton via GLM endpoint.
tasks.impact: False healthy states and unstable startup sequencing.
actions: Add explicit healthchecks for api-gateway, temporal-worker, preprocessing, post-processing.
Split readiness vs liveness endpoints.
Make gateway health check actual dependency graph independently.
acceptance_criteria: Compose/K8s only routes traffic to ready services.
Health endpoint correctly reports each dependency.

tasks.title: Formalize database migration strategy
tasks.flaw: Schema changes rely on app AutoMigrate at startup.
tasks.impact: Uncontrolled schema drift and risky rollbacks in production.
actions: Adopt explicit migration tool (goose/atlas/liquibase/flyway).
Gate app startup on migration state and version.
acceptance_criteria: Versioned migrations with rollback scripts exist.
No runtime AutoMigrate in production profile.

tasks.title: Fix queue/job lifecycle observability gaps
tasks.flaw: Job completion/failure/page/confidence metrics are partially instrumented but mostly not emitted.
tasks.impact: Operational blind spots and weak SLA tracking.
actions: Emit lifecycle events at workflow completion/failure sync path.
Add queue lag, workflow latency, and downstream error-rate dashboards.
Alert on queue depth, workflow retries, and model failure spikes.
acceptance_criteria: Metrics dashboards show end-to-end success rate and latency percentiles.
Alerts fire on synthetic failure scenarios.

tasks.title: Unify API key format and remove role suffix ambiguity
tasks.flaw: Some env examples include role suffix in key values while middleware expects exact key token.
tasks.impact: Auth failures and operator confusion across environments.
actions: Define canonical API key format.
If role metadata needed, store separate mapping structure.
Add startup validator and auth unit tests for valid/invalid key shapes.
acceptance_criteria: All documented sample keys authenticate correctly.
No role suffix parsing ambiguity remains.
implementation_notes: Auth loader now accepts IDEP_API_KEYS and API_KEYS.
Legacy key entries with role suffix (key:role) are normalized to key-only at load time.

tasks.title: Pin infra image versions and reproducible build inputs
tasks.flaw: Use of `latest` tags in observability stack and mixed dependency resolution.
actions: Pin image digests/tags for Prometheus, Grafana, Jaeger.
Lock Python/Go dependencies for release builds.
acceptance_criteria: Rebuild on different days yields same versions.
Upgrade flow is explicit via PR.

tasks.title: Separate dev and prod compose profiles cleanly
tasks.flaw: Dev overrides and debug settings can bleed into runtime assumptions.
tasks.impact: Behavior drift and accidental debug exposure.
actions: Use compose profiles (`dev`, `prod`, `e2e`) with explicit commands.
Disable reload/debug and admin tools in prod profile.
acceptance_criteria: Prod profile has no debug tools, no code mounts, no reload.
Dev profile remains fast for iteration.
implementation_notes: Added explicit inference backend env in docker compose for deterministic docker behavior.
Added local startup script and runtime guide to support local app-service execution with local infra.
Remaining work: introduce compose profiles (dev/prod/e2e) and remove implicit override coupling.

tasks.title: Support dual runtime (Docker + Local) for inference pipeline
tasks.flaw: Worker inference path was Triton-only, limiting local non-Docker execution options.
tasks.impact: Developers with Docker/GPU issues were blocked from running end-to-end locally.
actions: Add runtime-selectable inference backend in temporal worker.
Keep Triton path for Docker while adding direct GLM service path for local.
Provide local startup script and runtime documentation.
acceptance_criteria: Docker mode continues using Triton without behavior regressions.
Local mode runs with INFERENCE_BACKEND=glm_service and processes documents.
Switching backends requires env change only (no code edits).
implementation_notes: Added INFERENCE_BACKEND and GLM_OCR_SERVICE_URL to worker config and wiring.
Implemented direct GLM HTTP inference fallback in temporal-worker activities.
Added start_services_local.ps1 and LOCAL_RUN_GUIDE.md for local execution.

tasks.title: Add CI pipeline for contract, integration, and security gates
tasks.flaw: No repository CI workflow detected for automated checks.
actions: Add CI stages: lint, unit, contract tests, integration smoke, secret scan.
Require passing checks before merge.
acceptance_criteria: PRs blocked on failing architecture-critical checks.
Post-processing contract tests run on each change.

tasks.title: Improve failure-mode behavior for Triton/model startup
tasks.flaw: Model startup and fallback modes are complex; strict/fallback behavior can be confusing operationally.
tasks.impact: Hard-to-diagnose startup failures under GPU/resource pressure.
actions: Document deterministic startup matrix (strict real vs fallback).
Expose explicit readiness reason codes and startup diagnostics endpoint.
acceptance_criteria: Operators can identify failure reason in <2 minutes from logs/health response.
No ambiguous 'healthy but degraded' states.

tasks.title: Rationalize duplicate docs and enforce doc-to-config consistency checks
tasks.flaw: Runbook/API/demo docs contain mixed assumptions and env names.
actions: Create single source of truth for runtime configuration matrix.
Add doc lint/check script against env schema.
acceptance_criteria: No contradictory env variable names across docs/code.
New config changes fail CI unless docs updated.
